programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Spring Break Adventure
programme.desc: Its 1916 and Indiana Jones is living with his dad in Princeton New Jersey Spring break is fast approaching and all Indy can think of is taking his girlfriend Nancy daughter of cliffhanger author Edward Stratemeyer to the prom in a slick new Bugati The cars foreign engine is impossible to get parts for but a favor from a professor working at Thomas Edisons laboratory raises his hopes His plans are sidetracked when a mysterious break-in the theft of an electric motor and rumors of German spies result in a mystery that only Indy and Nancy can unravel Indy and his father then head to the southwest to visit family in Albuquerque With his mischievous cousin Frank Indy heads to Columbus New Mexico to sew some wild oats when the town is suddenly attacked by Pancho Villa and his riders Playing hero Indy follows the Villistas into the desert and is soon taken captive As a 16-year old itching for a good fight Indy is stirred by Villas words and joins his cause riding with the Villistas as General Pershing chases them throughout the desert Indy meets and befriends the Belgian expatriate Remy witnesses the intensity of a young George S Patton and also finds a murderer who escaped the law eight years earlier in Cairo in this adventure that sets the teenage Indy on a path that will lead him to war-torn Europe

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Power of the Space Knights

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ancient crystal skull is stolen during an auction By looking through it Miles Mayhem learns Matt Trakkers identity as the leader of MASK and blackmails him into giving up the rest of his secrets and technology

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The Realm is being destroyed by a horrible Demo-Dragon The only weapon that can stop it is the Treasure of Tardos but even if they get it the team will need a most unlikely ally

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce follows a clue to Audric and meets up with the gambler Vendetta who has a tape regarding his father but Jayce has to win it in a game It is a trap laid by Saw Boss Vendetta plays a game with Herc to settle an old debt of Hercs

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain head to an island in the Pacific Ocean where MAD plan to explode an underwater bomb

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A witch fights to gain a powerful occult symbol using a helpless Ryan in the process

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to Bloodlines teenager Lisa agrees to swap babysitting duties with her friend Heidi as a favor She discovers that a relative who is locked in the familys cellar wants revenge - even invading her dreams to get it

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hooker learns that beauty is only skin deep

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Eager and unscrupulous tabloid newspaper reporter Jane L will go to any length to score a juicy scoop Jane L gets in way over her head when she goes snooping around a remote rural mansion in search of Billy Baltimore a legendary 60s acid rock guitarist who reportedly died twenty years ago

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Knight 306
programme.desc: Knight 306

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan is turned into a servant of the devil and the only hope he has is a young girl who believes in Gods love

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans plan to relieve the bombing pressure on London with a trap hinges on Carters ability to remember the name of a town - Leadingham

programme.title: Mchale 302
programme.desc: Mchale 302

programme.title: Mchale 229
programme.desc: Mchale 229

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: verybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys find out that they are three months behind on their mortgage payments and will lose the farm if they cant come up with the money Grandpa fears that he will have to sell a 200 year old flintlock family rifle to get the payment

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate wants to discipline Hassie and Little Luke for bad grades and skipping school but Grandpa thinks she is being too tough So Kate lets Grandpa takes over raising the kids

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 are looking for the man that is sabotaging missile launches

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is going to London to do some undercover work

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When Bear becomes ill BJ takes him to a vet and is subsequently told that he has died However it turns out that the vet is secretly selling animals to a laboratory and Bear is still alive

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Suspecting a security leak at Stalag 13 Gen Burkhalter goes fishing with some false information and Col Hogan falls for the bait As a result Burkhalter plants a spy among the prisoners to expose the guilty parties

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget protects a man who knows too much

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget guards a priceless coin collection

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaacs Ted Lange favorite singer Roxy Blue Diahann Carroll becomes his lover Talky Robert Tanners Jim Nabors popularity increases when fellow passengers think he may be a jewel thief Bert Fredericks David Groh plans his wife Denises Michele Lee birthday party but she thinks its a murder plot

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Space1999

programme.title: Wavelength
programme.desc: Two young lovers learn that a small group of child-like space aliens are marooned on Earth and are being held prisoner at a top secret military facility The couple then decide to liberate the extraterrestrial castaways and help them make a rendezvous with a rescue ship sent from the alien home planet

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are skinny-dipping in a local pond when two pool hustlers steal both the cousins clothing and the General Lee Rosco soon pursues who he thinks are the Duke boys but the crooks drive the stolen General Lee into the lake When nobody is found with the car Rosco tearfully announces that Bo and Luke have drowned Bo and Luke arrive home safe and sound then learn that Boss has used their alleged deaths to implicate them on the theft of his gold watch so he can fraudulently collect the insurance money The Duke boys and Cooter concoct a scheme to turn the General Lee into a ghost and haunt Boss and Rosco until they admit their scheme

programme.title: Hercules 207
programme.desc: Hercules 207

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone helps prevents a suicide of a handless girl Daan wants to use revolutionary Taelon technology to help the girl for propaganda reasons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens take over the members of a punk rock band and add a secret electronic signal to their music which will drive young people into a violent frenzy Meanwhile Kincaid begins a romance with his late brothers girlfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Little Joshuas overactive imagination mistakes Arcanes hydration units for pirate treasure Are they as innocent as they sound

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: As the gods look on two figures from mythology play out an ancient story But can Alec break the curse before his friends die

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter a miles-long ark from the planet Daria where the inhabitants have a very distinctive class separation

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A military test is conducted in the remote desert and headquartered in the resort where Kimble is working He learns of the top-secret operation and this knowledge puts him in great danger

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: Nick and Heath on the trail of a gang of murderous raiders stealing horses in the Valley enlist the help of the ex-sheriff of Stockton The motivation behind his help proves interesting and totally unexpected-especially to the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A fortune in diamonds awaits anyone who gets to it first Murder and arson are just some of the ways of keeping some from succeeding A stranger follows Cheyenne and the treasure hunting party but is he all they have to worry about

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody enlists the help of self-proclaimed preacher Gideon Poole but regrets it when he learns the truth about him

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two firemen are killed in a warehouse fire one of them Stones friend and he and Keller are drawn into an arson investigation

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jack Cole was arrested and imprisoned for stealing art treasures of a Latin nation The mission for Phelps and the IM team is to get the objects back But that wont be easy Coles being tortured by the colonel who heads the prison -- and the colonels a traitor who wants the treasure for himself The IMF plans calls for playing the 2 men each deadly off each other

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A favorite son now a huge success comes back to his hometown to start a new operation At first everyone seems to be happy hes back but simmering jealousies come to the front when someone threatens to kill him

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the amateur matchup of debut Kyle Messenger vs. Patrick 'Cyborg' Leblanc. Also in his amateur debut, Nick Felber faces Tyler Kobayashi. The pro card begins with Trenton Rowell vs. former Light Heavyweight and Heavyweight Amateur Champion, Devon ""Mr. Boomtruck"" Smith. Capping this show is an exciting Light Heavyweight Title Fight between Misha Cirkunov defending his title against challenger Shaun Asher. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: A tussle with a comet hurls the Pride and crew twenty-five years back in time to Jayces home planet They search and find Audric when he was a student Jayce tells him he is his son and after much hesitation Audric almost believes him

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss and Monster Minds are blocking sunlight to a planet making it too cold for that planets defensive humruns large bugs to be capable of fighting and eating the Monster Mind vines Jayce and Oon are imprisoned by the native people

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Dr Choi is kidnapped by a giant mechanical scorpion VENOM forces him to help them locate the lost treasure of Kubla Khan hidden inside the Great Wall of China

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: During the ceremony of Matt Trakkers honorary knighthood two yeoman warders are suddenly attacked by ravens Vanessa Warfield has been training them to be used in a crown jewel heist

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall
